creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Tameling from comment #14)
From this discussion, I found that I had old (14.1) sources checked out from Git at /usr/src. Apparently drm-kmod port generates the warning from the running version of FreeBSD and not the version of sources at /usr/src. Now my console is working fine after loading i915kms. Thanks all!
